questions.question_text: CO Mapping Define business Analytics 1 What is data visualization? 1 What is data cleansing? 2 List data collection methods. 2 How you recognize a problem as business analytics? 3 What are according to you core competencies of a business analytics? 3 What is difference between data and information? 4 What are common challenges of business analytics? 4 CO Mapping
Discuss importance of reports in business analytics. Elucidate various types of reports used. Explain key elements of custom reports. 1

How can analytics be used in the following situations? Support your answers with suitable examples. Exploring market opportunities Understanding customer service 2

What do you understand by a model? Discuss nature of a typical decision model. Explain three forms of decision models. 3
